allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); v=d[0]['value'] if d else []; print\('records:', len\(v\)\); [print\(' -', r.get\('month'\), '| reset:', r.get\('reset_date'\), '| painters:', len\(r.get\('painters',[]\)\), '| total_pts:', sum\(p.get\('points',0\) for p in r.get\('painters',[]\)\)\) for r in v]")
